default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up between Nate Anderson (Teero) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) to discuss potential SEO collaboration and previous interactions.](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Teero shifted from Google Meet to Zoom due to VC preferences and superior video quality](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Marcel's introductions (Sylvia at Conversion.io, Webstacks) have led to successful business relationships](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Teero was initially interested in fwd.digital's SEO services but hesitated due to concerns about SEO efficacy in the dental space and high upfront costs](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Zoom Adoption

  - [Teero initially anti-Zoom, preferred Google Meet](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Switched to Zoom after fundraising round due to VC usage and better video quality](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Currently in transition phase, "half-switched"](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Noted Zoom's complexity with "50 million settings"](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Marcel's Network and Introductions

  - [Introduced Sylvia (Conversion.io), now used by Teero](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Sylvia's career progression: freelancer → Metadata head of product → own successful business](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Webstacks.com introduction: from freelancer to 70-person agency, $15M/year revenue](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Marcel's talent for identifying and nurturing successful entrepreneurs](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Teero's SEO Considerations

  - [Initially very interested in fwd.digital's services after first meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Perceived as "smart" with a "unique value proposition"](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Delayed SEO engagement to focus on conversion optimization (lowest hanging fruit)](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Concerns raised by other SEO agencies about efficacy in dental space](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Teero's vision extends beyond just dental, but still within dental space](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Hesitation due to need for sufficient inbound traffic to justify SEO investment](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### Financial Considerations

  - [fwd.digital's fees were considered reasonable](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Shock at Ahrefs' software pricing](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Combined costs (agency + tools) approaching $150k for one-year commitment felt significant](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Uncertainty about SEO efficacy made large upfront commitment challenging](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Further discussion needed on SEO potential in Teero's specific market](https://fathom.video/share/VLZ8gdDd3BPQ2uTrz57QyV9ZvXHxMCon?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - Explore possibility of adjusted engagement model or pricing structure
  - Consider phased approach to SEO implementation to mitigate risk
  - Investigate Teero's broader vision within dental space for SEO opportunities
